blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots are present that obscure text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations are present.

tears_or_folds.description: No visible tears, creases, folds, or wrinkles.

cut_off_detection.description: No document edges are cut off, and the image frame includes all necessary portions.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections or incomplete parts of the receipt/invoice.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements obscure the document content.

classification.reasoning: The document contains all necessary fields to be classified as an expense document. It includes supplier details, consumer details, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, tax information, payment method, and item description line items. The document is a Vietnamese invoice for telecommunications services provided by Viettel.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: All 8 required fields are present in the document, confirming it as an expense document.
